value.found_quote: [Find bugs with ultrareview](/en/ultrareview): the code review counterpart to ultraplan for catching issues before merge
value.rationale: The page is primarily about ultraplan, but in the Related resources section it references "ultrareview" as the code review counterpart to ultraplan, an Anthropic/Claude Code offering. This substantiates that ultrareview exists as an offering. The page does not describe its lifecycle stage, so status is unknown. The claim that it runs from the CLI is implied by being the counterpart to ultraplan (a CLI feature) but not explicitly stated on this page.
